rule_metadata.name: NoodleRAT
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'NoodleRAT' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule NoodleRAT
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'NoodleRAT' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "NoodleRAT"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\/tmp\/\.llock/
		$string2 = /\/usr\/include\/sdfwex\.h/
		$string3 = /\\NoodMaker\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = /NoodLinux\sv1\.0\.1/

	condition:
		any of them
}
